title: Target Lists with Segmentation
description:
Transform your email marketing approach from broadcast to precision targeting.

This Short Course was created to help marketing professionals accomplish strategic audience segmentation that drives measurable results. By completing this course, you'll be able to segment contact databases using behavioral and demographic data, create high-value customer segments, and implement quarterly performance reviews that continuously optimize your targeting approach.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
Build advanced segments combining behavioral and demographic attributes
Create dynamic lists for recent purchasers, high-value customers, and inactive leads
Analyze segment performance metrics and implement data-driven refinements

This course is unique because it combines strategic segmentation theory with practical performance analysis skills that directly impact ROI.

To be successful in this project, you should have a background in basic email marketing concepts and contact database management.
